name: Siam At Siam Design Hotel Pattaya
detail: brand new hotel in pattaya! i've always thought the what ever photos they post in agoda doesnt really look like what the actual hotel is. but i was wrong, beside the hotel is cheap the room is very nice, clean and huge. i got the leisure room and it was one of the best room's i had. the infinity pool was amazing! just like the marina bay sand's in singapore, the hotels pool was outstanding. two pools, 24th and 26th floor. they also show movies every night 1900 at the pool. the staff were very helpful and attentive, from the moment you check-in to the moment you check-out. i really loved the hotel, i would stay again in this hotel if i come back to pattaya.

name: Sunday Grand Jomtien Pattaya
detail: Came in for business and this place did its job well.

name: Sunday Wongamat Privacy Pattaya
detail: 5 stars ! super Hotel ! super Big room ! 2 Big swimming pools ! Cool Service ! Relax ! Book now . All for good . Super cheap in Pattaya . Near pull man resort ... many resort !!! super price Lễ tân cực kỳ thân thiện . 100 sao ! siêu khách sạn! Phòng siêu lớn! 2 bể bơi lớn! Dịch vụ tuyệt vời! Thư giãn ! Đặt bây giơ . Tất cả cho tốt. Siêu rẻ ở Pattaya. Cực nhiều Hot Gơn Russian 5 звезд ! супер отель! супер большая комната! 2 больших бассейна! Классный Сервис! Расслабьтесь ! Забронируйте сейчас . Все насовсем. Супер дешево в Паттайе

name: Aya Boutique Hotel
detail: I liked this hotel very much. For the money it is a great bargain. It's clean, in a great location, centrally located around Soi 13 half way between the madness at soi 5 and walking street. The room is high end because this is a newer property so it's modern looking. I didn't really like that it had a bath tub rather then a stand up shower but this is definitely not a negative. The fact that the show has no door also is a bit annoying but most places in Thailand seem to be the same. The one dowside to this hotel is the pool. I have no idea why but that stuck the pool on the 2nd or 3rd poor. It's sort of an indoor pool with about 10% of the pool outdoors in the sun and the the rest of the pool shaded. For this reason not many people use the pool which is nice, but the water is cold because most of the pool gets no sun. This is really the only negative I could find about this hotel. Everything else is wonderful and I would say it's one of the best boutique hotels in Pattaya for the money, about $65 USD.
area: Pattaya Beach Road,Pattaya - View on map

name: Hotel Amber Pattaya
detail: For a 4 star hotel you are not going to get anything better!!! A brand new hotel that is immaculate, gym, sauna, nice pool area and a great room. We had a Superior room with a queen bed that was so comfortable. Buffet breakfast was nice with plenty of options English, Thai and Indian. Location is perfect, on a quieter street set back a little but walk 2 mins up the street and you are right in mix for bars and everything Pattaya offers. Price point was fantastic value for money. You can not go wrong staying athe Hotel Amber.

name: Penthouse Pattaya
detail: It was a great room for both single travellers and couples.
area: Pattaya Beach Road,Pattaya - View on map

name: Arbour Hotel and Residence Pattaya
detail: The rooftop bar and restaurant is absolutely amazing.

name: April Suites Pattaya
detail: i had called ahead to confirm my reservation and ask a few questions and the people who answered the phone all spoke very good English and before i even arrived i had a good impression of the place. easy to get too, the hotel is right off of Pattaya Klang/Central Pattaya Road and it only took 10 minutes to get to from the bus terminal on North Pattaya Road/Pattaya Nuea by motorcycle taxi (50 Baht fare) and it is 10 min walk to Beach Road. April Suites was recommended to me by a friend and upon arrival i was pleasantly surprised to see that it was exactly like the photos on the website, even better. check in was fast and trouble free, they had all the paper work started prior to my arrival and i was in my room relaxing within 10 minutes. the hotel is fairly new & everything was in perfect shape, the room is sensibly & beautifully furnished, THE BED IS FANTASTIC, bathrooms are well laid out & i had hot water & good pressure on demand at all times which is not always the case in Pattaya hotels. the room has a big flat screen TV, an OK sized desk/work area & the WiFi was never a problem (not super fast, but i was always able to work with ease). it is one of the only rooms i have stayed in anywhere, at any price, that has enough electrical outlets, in all the right places & they were grounded. for a business traveler with a computer this is a big plus. one of the best features of the hotel is the nice quiet roof-top pool area. great sofa beds & umbrellas, the area & the pool itself are spotlessly clean & the staff are attentive & once again, speak great English. there is a small but decent gym & a fantastic, clean, HOT sauna. the few times i ordered drinks they came quickly & are not overpriced. i did not try the food so i cannot comment. there is a large frig & you can stock it by going to the Tops Market located on the corner to across Pattaya Sai 2. i have stayed in every room type & all are good & spacious & the suite room was like a smal

name: March Hotel
detail: March hotel is a brand new property which provides you with best in class amenities within affordable price. I booked this hotel from Agoda with expectations of getting a class facility similar to April and August suites as the owner is same - and the hotel exceeded my expectations - I have previously stayed in April suites also so I trusted this new property - really they kept my trust. This hotel is managed, staffed and maintained to the highest degree and is excellent value for money. It is Located near to Tops supermarket( Central Pattaya) in a quiet street (very common in Thailand provincial towns), but the nightlife is only 3-4 minutes away. This may not be a 5 start luxury hotel but the interior design, decoration and layout makes it a very comfortable stay. The balcony is big, the fridge is big, the pool is well designed - in short it is much better than many of the 4 star establishments in Pattaya and elsewhere. I stayed with my 4 friends and one couple - all of them may not be free to write a review but on their behalf too it was rated the best value for money hotel. The receptionist Miss Julia took great care for all of us - she is very polite and caring. We started our stay very next day of the Grand opening of the hotel and I am sure the standards will be maintained in the coming years too. To close this review at last I would like to add - I really enjoyed my stay here, believe me and you will also.

name: Acqua Hotel
detail: One of the best hotel experience with accommodating staff, very clean room, and relaxing pool and amenities. I love how the hotel is near to malls, beach, and tourist attractions. We’d choose this hotel again if ever we’ll come back to pattaya. Khap kun kah!
